function.description: Read a text file from the workspace. Returns contents prefixed with 1-indexed line numbers so subsequent FileEdit calls can reference them. Pass ``offset`` / ``limit`` to read a slice of a large file.
function.name: FileRead

limit.description: Maximum lines to return. Defaults to 2000.

offset.description: Zero-based line number to start reading at.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path (must resolve inside the workspace root).
